name: Grover Whalen
abstract: Grover Aloysius Whalen (1886–1962) was a prominent politician, businessman, and public relations guru in New York City during the 1930s and 1940s.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: he was the official receptionist for New York... He was a well known name and people around who heard that title would have known who I was talking about
